# Real Estate Vertical Strategy

## Why Real Estate Vertical?

| Factor | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **TAM (US)** | $0.9B |
| **Pain Score** | 8/10 |
| **Sales Cycle** | 2-4 weeks (fast) |
| **Decision Maker** | Broker/Owner (1 person) |
| **Compliance** | TCPA (moderate, no HIPAA) |
| **ACV Target** | $500-2,000/mo per brokerage |
| **Path to $1M ARR** | 100 brokerages × $800/mo avg |

---

## Target Customer Profile (ICP)

```
Primary ICP:
- Real Estate Brokerages with 10-50 agents
- 50+ transactions/year
- Currently using ISA (Inside Sales Agent) OR
- Considering hiring ISA ($40-60K/year cost)
- Tech-forward (uses CRM like Follow Up Boss)

Pain Points:
- 8-12% cold call answer rate
- Agents waste 80% time on voicemails/no-answers
- Lost leads after 6pm (no coverage)
- $40-60K/year ISA cost
- High ISA turnover (training waste)
```

---

## 💵 Real Estate Pricing Tiers

| Plan | Price | Includes | Target |
|------|-------|----------|--------|
| **Solo Agent** | $149/mo | 500 mins, 1 phone number, basic scripts | Individual agents |
| **Team** | $499/mo | 2,000 mins, 3 numbers, CRM integration, lead scoring | Small teams (5-10) |
| **Brokerage** | $1,499/mo | 10,000 mins, unlimited numbers, white-label, priority support | Brokerages (20+) |
| **Enterprise** | Custom | Dedicated instance, custom integrations, SLA | Large brokerages |

---

## ✅ Success Metrics

| Metric | Target | Measurement |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| **Answer Rate** | >15% | Answered / Attempted |
| **Appointment Rate** | >8% | Appointments / Conversations |
| **Customer Churn** | <5%/mo | Monthly churn rate |
| **NPS** | >50 | Quarterly survey |
| **CAC** | <$400 | Total marketing / New customers |
| **LTV** | >$4,000 | Avg revenue × avg lifetime |
| **LTV:CAC** | >10:1 | Target ratio |

---

## 💰 Revenue Targets

| Month | Customers | MRR | Notes |
|-------|-----------|-----|-------|
| Month 1-2 | 5 beta | $0 | Free beta for testimonials |
| Month 3 | 10 paying | $5,000 | $500 avg |
| Month 4 | 20 paying | $12,000 | $600 avg |
| Month 5 | 35 paying | $24,500 | $700 avg |
| Month 6 | 50 paying | $40,000 | $800 avg |
| **Month 12** | **125 paying** | **$100,000** | **$800 avg** |
